raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.3,"R1.2":0.3,"R1.3":0.3,"R1.4":0.3,"R1.5":0.0,"R1.6":0.7,"R1.7":0.3,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":false,"clarification_question":"","rationale":{"R1.6":"The delegation asks to look at a paragraph, making sentence- and paragraph-level writing quality the central expected responsibility.","RX.1":"Any response should disclose uncertainty because the requested form of attention is underspecified.","RX.2":"The response should avoid making stronger claims about the paragraph than the artifact supports.","RX.3":"The response must remain limited to inspecting the paragraph rather than rewriting or extending the work.","RX.4":"The response should avoid advice that could encourage misleading research claims or unsupported presentation.","RX.5":"Observations should be traceable to the provided paragraph rather than unstated assumptions."}}

rationale.R1.6: The delegation asks to look at a paragraph, making sentence- and paragraph-level writing quality the central expected responsibility.
rationale.RX.1: Any response should disclose uncertainty because the requested form of attention is underspecified.
rationale.RX.2: The response should avoid making stronger claims about the paragraph than the artifact supports.
rationale.RX.3: The response must remain limited to inspecting the paragraph rather than rewriting or extending the work.
rationale.RX.4: The response should avoid advice that could encourage misleading research claims or unsupported presentation.
rationale.RX.5: Observations should be traceable to the provided paragraph rather than unstated assumptions.
